notes: International candidate: accented characters in name (José Hernández García), Spanish section headers ('Resumen Profesional', 'Experiencia Profesional', 'Educación'), DD/MM/YYYY date format, European location ('Madrid, España'). Tests that the parser doesn't choke on non-English headers or accented unicode in the name field. The deterministic parser likely WILL miss the Spanish section headers — they're not in our aliases dict — and this is intentional: the test should expose that gap.
